scripts.dev: concurrently --names "FRONT,SERVER,STORYBOOK" --prefix-colors "cyan,yellow" "npm run dev:front" "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:storybook"
scripts.dev:front: npx dotenvx run -- sh -c 'cd frontend && npm run dev'
scripts.dev:server: npx dotenvx run -- sh -c 'cd server && python -m uvicorn app.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000 --reload'
scripts.install:all: npm ci && cd frontend && npm ci
scripts.sync: npm run install:all && cd server && uv sync
scripts.build:stg: npx dotenvx run --env-file .env.stg -- sh -c 'cd frontend && npm run build'
scripts.build:prod: npx dotenvx run --env-file .env.prod -- sh -c 'cd frontend && npm run build'
